# Project State Analysis — 2026-05-22

**Branch:** `main` (clean, up to date with origin)

## Burn rate

| Period    | Key output                                                |

| May 13–14 | Scaffold, ADRs, GH issues backlog, initial PRs            |
| May 14–18 | 1A infra merged (PRs #20, #21), 1B auth merged (#23)      |
| May 18–19 | 1C entity engine (#33), 1D workflow engine (#40, #41)     |

**Total elapsed:** ~9 calendar days, ~7 active engineering days.
**PR throughput:** 17 merged PRs. ~2.4/day.
**Assessment:** Very fast for foundation work. Enabled by AI-first workflow + well-specced architecture upfront.

## Phase 2 — Not started

4 tracks, 0% complete. 7 carry-over issues to triage before progressing.

**Phase 2 tracks:**

- 2A Platform Services (Novu, files, audit log, view_configs) — #12
- 2B Module system + 7 standard module seed files — #13
- 2C Customer portal + agent UI — #14
- 2D No-code builders + Metabase — #15

**Carry-overs requiring triage:**

- #3 — Workflow reliability gaps (Vijit, open)
- #5 — Tenant lifecycle / audit log architecture (abmish, open)
- #2 — PII leakage / data isolation gaps (unassigned)
- #4 — Schema cache & Redis efficiency (unassigned)
- #62 — Workflow version GC + stuck instances (unassigned)
- #64 — Transition rollback / undo policy (unassigned)
- #65 — Parallel approval edge cases (unassigned)

**Decision needed:** Which of these are Phase 2 prerequisites (must close before pilot) vs acceptable-to-defer to Phase 3?

Recommended prerequisites before pilot: **#2, #3, #5** (security + reliability + compliance). #4, #62, #64, #65 can be deferred.

---

## Phase 3 — Not started

5 tracks (connectors, plugins, AI layer, observability, ops). No work begun. Expected start: post-pilot onboarding (~Jul 2026).
